title: #67 | Indievelopment: Feb 26
description: From forging blades for a revolution to rolling goblin sushi under the gun, this past month was about mastering the job at hand. Balance industrial survival against alien flora or brew the perfect coffee in a list that spans the gap between chaotic management and cozy retreat.
author: Indieformer

title: #63 | Showcase: Jan 26
description: Whether you are enforcing quarantines in a collapsing city or battling corporate fairytales, this month is about finding order in the chaos. We’ve curated a mix of punishing physics climbers, precise sports sims, and narrative RPGs to test your reflexes and your ethics.
author: Indieformer

title: #62 | Indievelopment: Jan 26
description: Survive the freezing dark of a permadeath mechanic sim or drift through the colorful memories of a youth left behind. This month's collection spans the gap between brutal technical challenges and high-speed, arcade chaos.
author: Indieformer

title: #60 | 2025's Best Indie Games
description: A curated sweep of 2025’s releases, pulled from across the year and gathered in one place for anyone still looking for something worth playing.
author: Indieformer

title: #40 | Indievelopment
description: From bullet-hell magic duels and surreal open-world oddities to papercraft critter quests, memory-bending puzzles, and chaotic hoop-slam showdowns — this line-up delivers weird, wonderful worlds worth diving into.
author: Indieformer

title: #38 | Monthly Showcase
description: Jam-packed and bursting at the seams—roaming city-builders, rhythm shootouts, beat-blasted gunfights, and snow-sniffing pups. Clear some hard-drive space; this lineup doesn’t travel light.
author: Indieformer

title: #30 | Indievelopment
description: Venture into worlds unknown. From post-apocalyptic oases and eldritch horrors to towering fortresses and literary realms—discover the stories that demand to be told.
author: Indieformer

title: #29 | He Set Out to Make a Roguelike. Then He Played Pokémon.
description: Years into his dev career, Sean Young stumbled into the monster-collecting genre — and it changed everything. Monsterpatch is the game he didn’t grow up dreaming about, but one he felt he had to make.
author: Indieformer

title: #23 | Indievelopment
description: A journey through mystical realms, forgotten towns, and untamed frontiers—where dice decide fates, patience is a virtue, and chaos reigns supreme.
author: Indieformer

title: #18 | Monthly Showcase
description: Magical duels to gravity-defying combat and time-warping puzzles, this month’s lineup is all about power, precision, and unforgettable adventures.
author: Indieformer

title: #14 | Indievelopment
description: This issue dives into inventive roguelikes, cozy creations, and action-packed co-op adventures. Whether you’re defending wagons, swapping bodies, or running a Japanese shop, there’s a game to capture your imagination.
author: Indieformer

title: #12 | Indievelopment
description: Dive into unforgettable worlds—from jungle chaos and haunted hotels to cosmic cults and vampire clans.
author: Indieformer
